title: aster paludosus subsp. hemisphericus
intro: Aster paludosus subsp. hemisphericus, also known as the wetland or marsh aster, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with a range of medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Aster paludosus subsp. hemisphericus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
